element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players immediately control giant monsters; core mechanic available from start
Primary objective; introduced as safe, non-opposed action before military
Civilians yield health recovery and points; optional but rewarding
Damage sources that require defensive awareness while destroying
Risk/reward; smashing windows reveals helpful or dangerous items
Conditional danger; some items toggle between safe and dangerous states
Passive hazards requiring spatial awareness during climbing
Full healing and large point bonus; marks cycle completion

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching Mega Vitamin bonus at cycle end
typical_tension_triggers: Military vehicle attacks (helicopters, tanks, police cars)
Civilian NPC with camera flash (photographic hazard)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Non-linear; players determine pace by choosing destruction order and food targets. Military opposition gradually increases as cities progress. Cycle repeats 5 times across 128 days, with post-release difficulty patches added.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Windows that smash open reveal items; civilians waving signal rapid point gain opportunity
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Day Select menu accessible via B+Select on Controller 1 and B on Controller 2 simultaneously at title screen (though only 99 of 128 levels accessible)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Safe introduction to monster control and building destruction with minimal military opposition
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Military forces escalate; hazardous window items and environmental damage increase complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Sustained military pressure; accumulated damage risk; Mega Vitamin bonus provides reset before cycle repeat
notable_spikes: First military opposition encounter (transition from safe to moderate danger)
Introduction of conditional hazards (toaster, photographer, cigarettes)
Cycle repeats with escalating difficulty (up to 5 complete cycles)

notable_level_patterns.description: Game spans 128 days across North American cities starting in Peoria, Illinois and ending in Plano, Illinois. Cycle repeats 5 times; 7 US states spared from rampage.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Day 1 (Peoria) → Day 128 (Plano with Mega Vitamin bonus)

notable_level_patterns.description: Core level structure involves climbing buildings vertically, punching them down while managing military opposition from below and environmental hazards (lightning, falling damage)
Destruction of windows reveals unpredictable item outcomes: beneficial (food, money) or harmful (bombs, electrical appliances). Creates moment-to-moment risk assessment.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Early levels establish pattern; repeats throughout

sources_used: tcrf (The Cutting Room Floor - Rampage NES page)
